channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: HS basketball coach suspended after hanging up Palestinian flag, refusing to shake hands with Jewish coaches
item.description: A high school basketball coach was suspended after he hung up a Palestinian flag and refused to shake hands with Jewish coaches during a game.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mike McCarthy withdraws from Saints' coaching search and won't coach in 2025, AP source says
item.description: Mike McCarthy has decided against coaching in 2025, removing himself as a candidate to fill the NFL’s last remaining head coaching vacancy with the New Orleans Saints.
item.dc:creator: Brett Martel, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Lions agree to hire Broncos' John Morton as OC and promote Kelvin Sheppard to DC, AP source says
item.description: The Detroit Lions have agreed to hire Denver Broncos assistant John Morton as offensive coordinator and promote Kelvin Sheppard to defensive coordinator.
item.dc:creator: Larry Lage, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Ex-Bears coach Eberflus returns to Cowboys to run the defense; Sorensen takes over special teams
item.description: FRISCO, Texas (AP) — The Cowboys hired former Chicago Bears coach Matt Eberflus as defensive coordinator Tuesday for his second stint on the Dallas staff.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Eagles fan, 18, on life support after falling from street light pole during celebration: report
item.description: An 18-year-old Philadelphia Eagles fan reportedly suffered brain trauma after a fall from a light pole and is on life support after celebrating the team's NFC title.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Watch: Inside how Super Bowl footballs are made
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scheyer: Duke's Maluach OK after vomiting on court during 2nd half of win over NC State
item.description: DURHAM, N.C. (AP) — Duke coach Jon Scheyer said freshman big man Khaman Maluach was OK after vomiting on the court during the second half of Monday night's 74-64 win against North Carolina State. The 7-foot-2 Maluach was standing just outside the lane near the baseline behind N.C.
item.dc:creator: AARON BEARD, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jimmy Butler suspended for the 3rd time this month by the Miami Heat as trade deadline looms
item.description: MIAMI (AP) — Jimmy Butler was back from suspension. Again. And then Butler got suspended by the Miami Heat. Again. Butler has been suspended for the third time this month by the Heat, this one starting basically just as the second one was ending.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Hirings of Jets' Glenn and Patriots' Vrabel give NFL 5 teams with coaches who once played for them
item.description: Aaron Glenn had no doubts about where he wanted to go once the New York Jets' head-coaching job became available. Home sweet NFL home.
item.dc:creator: DENNIS WASZAK Jr., Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Super Bowl footballs are ready to go within hours of the matchup being set
item.description: As soon as this year's Super Bowl matchup was set, workers at the Wilson Sporting Goods football factory jumped into action. The factory in the rural village of Ada, Ohio, makes the game balls used by every NFL team along with many of the nation’s top college programs and high schools.
item.dc:creator: JOHN SEEWER, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: NASCAR Chicago Street Race tickets go on sale Monday
item.description: CHICAGO — Tickets for the NASCAR Chicago Street Race go on sale to the public Monday. The third edition of Chicago Street Race Weekend will be back downtown from July 5-6, capping off the Fourth of July holiday.
item.dc:creator: Marisa Rodriguez, WGN 9

item.title: Taylor Swift watches boyfriend Travis Kelce and the Chiefs beat the Bills and get back to Super Bowl
item.description: KANSAS CITY, Mo. (AP) — You could say that Taylor Swift's championship era has reached its second consecutive season.
item.dc:creator: DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ryan Pressly waives no-trade clause to join the Chicago Cubs, AP source says
item.description: The Chicago Cubs are finalizing a trade for Ryan Pressly, adding the right-hander to the back end of their bullpen in their second major offseason deal with the Houston Astros.
item.dc:creator: JAY COHEN, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Ohio State celebrates national championship run amid change and farewells
item.description: Fans braved 30-degree temperatures to welcome home a team that beat five top-10 rivals on its way to the title, including Oregon in the Rose Bowl, Texas in the Cotton Bowl and Notre Dame in the College Football Playoff championship game.
item.dc:creator: NICOLE KRAFT, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Saunders, Demin lead BYU past Cincinnati, 80-52
item.description: PROVO, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Behind its best shooting half of the season, BYU outscored Cincinnati by 23 in the second half en route to 80-52 victory over the Bearcats on Saturday evening at the Marriott Center. “We have a lot of good shooters," BYU head coach Kevin Young said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: 25-year-old San Diego native pursuing pro golf dreams at Farmers Invitational
item.description: The Farmer's Insurance Invitational, presented by the Advocates Professional Golf Association (APGA) Tour, is taking place on the North Course at Torrey Pines, showcasing the next generation of professional golfers and supporting minority players who dream of joining the PGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Tony Shin, Fox 5

item.title: Hurricanes acquire Rantanen from Avs, Hall from Blackhawks in 3-team trade
item.description: For the second straight year, the Carolina Hurricanes are taking a significant swing to bolster a perennial playoff team.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Whirlwind at Farmers Insurance Open; Wind Delay at Round 2
item.description: Another day spent at Torrey Pines, but it was not a quiet day by any means.. This course is already a difficult in itself, but try adding Santa Ana winds that gust up to 35 miles per hour? The gusts dealing the day an hour and a half suspension..
item.dc:creator: Bri Savant, Fox 5

item.title: Las Vegas Raiders agree to hire 73-year-old Pete Carroll as their head coach, AP source says
item.description: Pete Carroll has a youthful energy that many people half his age don't possess, and the Raiders hope that enthusiasm — and, more importantly, his proven track record — translates to Las Vegas.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI and MARK ANDERSON, Associated Press, KRON4

item.title: LeBron James picked for 21st straight All-Star Game, extending NBA record
item.description: LeBron James is extending his All-Star records. And Giannis Antetokounmpo is the people’s choice, again. The NBA revealed the starters — some of them, anyway — for the revamped All-Star Game on Thursday night, and there wasn't much in the way of surprises.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, NewsNation

item.title: CMU Women's Lacrosse looks to rewrite history
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX)—The Colorado Mesa University women's lacrosse team has been a dominant force in the Rocky Mountain Athletic Conference, finishing in second place for four straight years. This year, however, the Mavericks are determined to rewrite history.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Pair accused of selling fake Jason Kelce merchandise
item.description: Items included signed jerseys, helmets, hats, and photos, which were allegedly sold at several businesses.
item.dc:creator: Melanie DaSilva, NewsNation

item.title: San Diego native signs with SDFC
item.description: Midfielder Luca de la Torre is coming back to San Diego to play for his hometown Major League Soccer team.
item.dc:creator: Domenick Candelieri, Fox 5

item.title: NFL playoffs: Championship weekend on tap as 4 teams vie for a trip to Super Bowl LIX
item.description: The road to Super Bowl LIX ends Sunday. It's championship weekend, and by the time it's all over, we'll know which teams will represent the AFC and NFC on Sunday, Feb. 9, in New Orleans to play for the Lombardi Trophy.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9
